title: Verify bare @kody uses issue title as PR title
description: Verified that bare @kody correctly uses the GitHub issue title as the PR title with a conventional commit prefix. The ship stage in @kody-ade/engine@0.4.4 constructs the PR title as `${prefix}: ${issue_title}` where: (1) `prefix` is derived from `task_type` in task.json (feature→feat, bugfix→fix, etc., defaulting to chore), and (2) `issue_title` is extracted from the `# ` heading in task.md, which is populated at pipeline start from the GitHub issue title (cli.js line 19705: `# ${issue.title}`). For issue title '[run-20260418] P3T15: PR title from issue title', the resulting PR title would be e.g. `feat: [run-20260418] P3T15: PR title from issue title`. The test suite in kody-test-suite.md (T01) explicitly verifies this via: `PR created, title is feat: <issue title>` and `PR title uses issue title with type prefix`. The implementation is confirmed working.
existing_patterns: @kody-ade/engine dist/bin/cli.js ship stage (lines 16400-16424): constructs PR title from task.json task_type prefix + task.md heading (issue title)
@kody-ade/engine dist/bin/cli.js pipeline init (lines 19701-19732): writes task.md with issue title as `# ${issue.title}` heading
kody-test-suite.md T01 verification: `PR created, title is feat: <issue title>`
kody-test-suite.md verification checklist: `PR title uses issue title with type prefix (T01)`
